task_completion.description: Open the target presentation in LibreOffice Impress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Impress is open with 'quarterly_review.odp' visible in the window title bar.

task_completion.description: Open the external links management dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Links' dialog (accessed via Edit -> Links to External Files) is open, showing the linked image files pointing to '/home/ga/Desktop/assets/'.

task_completion.description: Break the external links to embed the images into the presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent selects the linked images in the dialog and clicks the 'Break Link' button, or the dialog is shown empty after the links have been successfully broken.

task_completion.description: Ensure the images are still present on the slides and their positions are unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slides are visible in the background or foreground with the charts/graphs clearly displayed, not deleted or manually repositioned.
The agent clicks the 'Save' icon, uses the File -> Save menu, or the window title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreOffice Impress GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show LibreOffice Impress interface being used, rather than terminal commands modifying the .odp XML archive directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the proper link breaking feature rather than deleting and re-inserting images.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Links' dialog and 'Break Link' button are used. The agent does not delete the images from the slide and use the 'Insert Image' dialog.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing scripts, sed commands, or zip commands to manipulate the quarterly_review.odp file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation is located at '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/quarterly_review.odp'. It contains exactly 2 linked images ('chart_sales.png' and 'graph_growth.png') stored in '/home/ga/Desktop/assets'. In LibreOffice Impress, converting linked images to embedded images is typically done by going to Edit -> 'Links to External Files...' and clicking 'Break Link' for each image.
